title: nf-core/exogaptwo pipeline - input.csv schema
description: Schema for the file provided with input.csv

name.errorMessage: Sample genome must be provided (can contain spaces).

taxid.errorMessage: TaxID must be provided and contain only numbers.

fasta.errorMessage: Fasta file for reads must be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fa', '.fna' or '.fasta'.

proteins_set.errorMessage: Main protein set file for reads can be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fa', '.fna' or '.fasta'.

transcripts_set.errorMessage: Transcriptome set file for reads can be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fa', '.fna' or '.fasta'.

repeats_set.errorMessage: Fasta library for repetitive elements annotation can be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fa', '.fna' or '.fasta'.
